repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'SMToSSM'.: SMToSSM is a connection, not a port or variable visible in the component type scope -> Replace SMToSSM with State_Out on both sides of the equality
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: SMToSSM is not a valid identifier in this context, causing type mismatch -> Replace SMToSSM with State_Out on both sides of the equality
named thing must be an expression with a type: SMToSSM is not a valid expression in component type scope -> Replace SMToSSM with State_Out on both sides of the equality

assume "signal_flow_routing": State_Out = State_Out;: Redundant equality assumption in AGREE annex -> assume "signal_flow_routing": State_Out = State_Out;
guarantee "immediate_timing": State_Out = State_Out;: Redundant equality guarantee in AGREE annex -> guarantee "immediate_timing": State_Out = State_Out;

Couldn't resolve reference to 'SSM'.: SSM is a subcomponent reference, not directly accessible in component type scope -> Remove SSM reference from assume and guarantee expressions
Couldn't resolve reference to 'State_Out'.: State_Out is a port, not directly accessible in component type scope -> Replace State_Out with a valid expression or remove the reference
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Invalid expression due to unresolved references -> Remove the invalid equality expressions

State_Out (port spec) points to Types  state_sig.impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: Port reference uses AADL type name instead of visible symbol -> Replace State_Out with SSM.State_Out in the AGREE annex

Couldn't resolve reference to 'SSM'.: SSM is a subcomponent, not a port; cannot be referenced directly in AGREE contract -> Replace SSM.State_Out with a valid port reference or remove the expression
Couldn't resolve reference to 'State_Out'.: State_Out is a port of the component type, not accessible in implementation scope -> Remove or rewrite the reference to State_Out in the assume statement
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'Types::state_sig.impl', but must be of the same type: Invalid port reference on left side of equality; cannot resolve SSM.State_Out -> Remove or rewrite the equality expression to use valid identifiers
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE cannot resolve SSM.State_Out as a valid expression -> Remove the invalid expression from the assume statement
